summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of case study detail pages (/work/:slug) and article detail pages (/insights/:slug). All 18 test cases passed. Case study pages render correctly with hero, meta bar (client/industry/timeline/team), challenge, approach steps, results grid, deliverables, testimonial, prev/next navigation, and CTA. Article pages render with header, gradient visual, full body content (headings/subheadings/paragraphs/lists), author card, and prev/next navigation. Invalid slugs show appropriate 'Not Found' messages. Work and Insights list pages have clickable Link cards. SEO tags are unique per page.

issues: Mobile menu does not have direct 'Insights' link - only Work/Services/Company/Careers (carried over from iteration 3)
HTML meta description shows default 'STARTON — Strategic creative agency...' instead of page-specific description. OG description is correct though (carried over from iteration 3)

critical_code_review_comments: ThemeContext.jsx: Theme state is not persisted to localStorage - toggling dark mode is reset on page refresh (carried over from iteration 1)
PageLayout.jsx: generateParticles() is called on every render - consider memoizing with useMemo (carried over from iteration 1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All detail pages tested: /work/:slug (8 projects) and /insights/:slug (8 articles). Case study slugs: nexus-finance, bloom-studio, atlas-ventures, pulse-health, nord-digital, summit-group, kinetic-labs, verdant-foods. Article slugs: why-most-rebrands-fail, compounding-content-strategy, speed-vs-quality-web-development, positioning-is-strategy, anatomy-high-converting-landing-page, freelancer-to-agency-lessons, design-systems-that-scale, performance-first-architecture. Data files: /frontend/src/data/projects.js and /frontend/src/data/articles.js. All navigation (prev/next, back links) working. CTA button on case study navigates to homepage. SEO implemented with unique titles and OG tags per page.

case_study_nexus_finance.details: All sections present: back link, category (Branding), title, hero visual, meta bar (4 items), challenge, approach (4 steps), results (4 cards), deliverables (8 items), testimonial, navigation, CTA

case_study_bloom_studio.details: Category: Web & UX, correct client/industry, results metrics (340%, 67%)

case_study_atlas_ventures.details: Category: Strategy, Industry: B2B SaaS, results metrics (4 months, 1,200+)

case_study_navigation.details: Prev/next navigation works correctly between projects

case_study_back_link.details: Back to Work link navigates to /work

case_study_cta_button.details: CTA button visible, enabled, and navigates to homepage on click

case_study_invalid_slug.details: 'Case Study Not Found' message displayed with back link

article_why_most_rebrands_fail.details: All sections present: back link, category (Branding), title, meta (date, read time, author), visual, body (3 headings, 3 subheadings, 7 paragraphs, 1 list), author card, navigation

article_compounding_content_strategy.details: Category: Growth, body content with correct headings and subheadings

article_body_content.details: Headings, subheadings, paragraphs, and bullet lists render correctly

article_navigation.details: Prev/next navigation works correctly between articles

article_back_link.details: Back to Insights link navigates to /insights

article_invalid_slug.details: 'Article Not Found' message displayed with back link

work_page_clickable_cards.details: Featured case study and project cards are <A> elements with correct hrefs

insights_page_clickable_cards.details: Featured article and article cards are <A> elements with correct hrefs

seo_article_page.details: Unique title, OG type 'article', OG tags present with correct URL
